mapper.sql: car_id, brand, model, year, mileage, price, registered_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cars (brand, model, year, mileage, price) VALUES (#{brand}, #{model}, #{year}, #{mileage}, #{price})
mapper.update: UPDATE cars SET brand = #{brand}, model = #{model}, year = #{year}, mileage = #{mileage}, price = #{price} WHERE car_id = #{carId}
